title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Blackbeard, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Unknown person #1, Blackbeard, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: and there he lost his life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Did you forget the Captain's last order!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's doing something to our dead boss!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Now I'll give you the ultimate show.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Blackbeard and White- Beard are inside!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If it fails, are we splitting up?

summary: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Unknown person #1, Blackbeard, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war.
